# Pioneer — docs index (mirror of https://docs.pioneer.ai/llms.txt)
# Captured 2026-06-27. Source of truth is the live URL above.

> Docs for building, fine-tuning, evaluating, and deploying models with Pioneer.

## Core
- CLI installation                 https://docs.pioneer.ai/CLI-Installation.md
- Quickstart                       https://docs.pioneer.ai/quickstart.md
- Authentication                   https://docs.pioneer.ai/authentication.md
- Introduction                     https://docs.pioneer.ai/introduction.md
- Pricing                          https://docs.pioneer.ai/pricing.md
- FAQ                              https://docs.pioneer.ai/faq.md

## API reference
- Overview (base URL, auth)        https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/overview.md
- Authentication                   https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/authentication.md
- Errors (401/402/404/422/429/500) https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/errors.md
- Rate limits                      https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/rate-limits.md
- Prompt caching                   https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/prompt-caching.md
- Datasets                         https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/datasets.md
- Evaluations                      https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/evaluations.md
- Synthetic data                   https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/synthetic-data.md
- Training jobs                    https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/training-jobs.md

## Inference endpoints
- POST /inference (native)         https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/inference/pioneer.md
- /v1/chat/completions (OpenAI)    https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/inference/openai-compatible.md
- /v1/messages (Anthropic)         https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/inference/anthropic-compatible.md
- Inference history & feedback     https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/inference/history.md
- Integrating with Opus 4.8        https://docs.pioneer.ai/api-reference/integrating-with-opus-4-8.md

## Concepts
- Datasets                         https://docs.pioneer.ai/concepts/datasets.md
- Evaluations                      https://docs.pioneer.ai/concepts/evaluations.md
- Inference                        https://docs.pioneer.ai/concepts/inference.md
- Models (encoders/decoders)       https://docs.pioneer.ai/concepts/models.md
- Router                           https://docs.pioneer.ai/concepts/router.md
- Training                         https://docs.pioneer.ai/concepts/training.md
- GLiGuard (safety SLM)            https://docs.pioneer.ai/concepts/g-li-guard.md
- GLiNER2-PII                      https://docs.pioneer.ai/concepts/g-li-ner-2-pii.md

- Synthetic data                   https://docs.pioneer.ai/guides/synthetic-data.md
